text.div:
Id: IMMZD2DTHepatitisALiveAttenuatedHAV1Dose
Url: IMMZ.D2.DT.Hepatitis A.Live attenuated HAV 1 dose
Version: 0.2.0
Title: IMMZ.D2.DT.Hepatitis A.Live attenuated HAV 1 dose
Status: draft
Type:

system: http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/plan-definition-type

code: eca-rule

Date: 2026-04-12 07:49:12+0000
Publisher: WHO
Description:

IMMZ.D2.DT.Hepatitis A.Live attenuated HAV 1 dose Live attenuated hepatitis A virus (HAV), 1 dose schedule
Knowledge Capability: computable
Related Artifacts:

References

  • WHO recommendations for routine immunization - summary tables (January 2025)
Libraries:
IMMZD2DTHepatitisALiveAttenuatedHAV1DoseLogic
Actions:
Determine if the client is due for HepatitisA.: Determine if the client is due for HepatitisA vaccine according to the national immunization protocol. Live attenuated hepatitis A virus (HAV), 1 dose schedule
If: Applicability: Client is due for Hepatitis A vaccination (Client is due for Hepatitis A vaccination)
Then: Definition: IMMZD2DTMR
Dynamic Values:
status: ('draft')
intent: ('proposal')
medication: (Concept { codes: { Code { system: 'http://smart.who.int/immunizations/CodeSystem/IMMZ.Z', code: 'DE5', display: 'Hepatitis A-containing vaccines' } }, display: 'Hepatitis A-containing vaccines' })
Check for Guidance for the patient regarding IMMZ.D2.DT.Hepatitis A.Live attenuated HAV 1 dose.: Show Guidance for the patient regarding IMMZ.D2.DT.Hepatitis A.Live attenuated HAV 1 dose.
If: Applicability: Has Guidance (Has Guidance)
Then: Definition: IMMZ.D2.DT.CR
Dynamic Values:
status: ('active')
payload.contentString: (Guidance)
category.coding: (Code { system: 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/communication-category', code: 'alert' })
priority: (Code { system: 'http://hl7.org/fhir/request-priority', code: 'routine' })

extension.valueString: IMMZEncounterElements
Current Patient Age In Months

/** 
 * @dataElement Patient age in months
 */
define "Current Patient Age In Months":
  AgeInMonthsAt(Today)
IMMZD2DTHepatitisAEncounterElements
Client's age is less than 18 months
IMMZD2DTHepatitisALiveAttenuatedHAV1DoseLogic
Client is not due for Hepatitis A vaccination Case 1
IMMZElements
Doses Administered to Patient

/**
 * @dataElement All Doses Administered to Patient
 */
define "Doses Administered to Patient":
  [Immunization] I
    where I.status = 'completed'
    and I.isSubpotent is not true
IMMZEncounterElements
Doses Administered to Patient

/**
 * @dataElement All Doses Administered to Patient
 */
define "Doses Administered to Patient":
  Elements."Doses Administered to Patient" I
    where I.occurrence.toInterval() same day or before Today
IMMZD2DTHepatitisAEncounterElements
Hepatitis A Doses Administered to Patient

/*
@internal: Hepatitis A containing Doses Administered to Patient
*/
define "Hepatitis A Doses Administered to Patient":
  Encounter."Doses Administered to Patient" I
  where
    I.vaccineCode in Concepts."Hepatitis A-containing vaccines"
IMMZD2DTHepatitisAEncounterElements
Hepatitis A Primary Series Doses Administered to Patient
IMMZD2DTHepatitisAEncounterElements
Number of Hepatitis A Primary Series Doses Administered
IMMZD2DTHepatitisAEncounterElements
No hepatitis A primary series doses were administered
IMMZD2DTHepatitisAEncounterElements
No hepatitis A primary series dose was administered
IMMZD2DTHepatitisAEncounterElements
Client's age is more than or equal to 18 months
IMMZElements
Live Attenuated Vaccines
IMMZEncounterElements
Live Attenuated Vaccines
IMMZEncounterElements
Date of Latest Live Attenuated Vaccine
IMMZEncounterElements
Live vaccine was administered in the last 4 weeks
IMMZD2DTHepatitisAEncounterElements
Live vaccine was administered in the last 4 weeks
IMMZD2DTHepatitisALiveAttenuatedHAV1DoseLogic
Client is not due for Hepatitis A vaccination Case 2
IMMZD2DTHepatitisALiveAttenuatedHAV1DoseLogic
Client is not due for Hepatitis A vaccination
IMMZD2DTHepatitisALiveAttenuatedHAV1DoseLogic
Client is not due for Hepatitis A vaccination Guidance

/*
@output: Client is not due for Hepatitis A vaccination Guidance
@guidance = Should not vaccinate client with Hepatitis A dose as client's age is less than 18 months. 
Check for any other vaccines due and inform the caregiver of when to come back for the first dose.
@guidance = Should not vaccinate client with Hepatitis A dose as live vaccine was administered in the last 4 weeks. 
Check for any other vaccines due and inform the caregiver of when to come back for the first dose.
*/
define "Client is not due for Hepatitis A vaccination Guidance":
  case
    when "Client is not due for Hepatitis A vaccination Case 1" then 'Should not vaccinate client with Hepatitis A dose as client\'s age is less than 18 months. 
Check for any other vaccines due and inform the caregiver of when to come back for the first dose.'
    when "Client is not due for Hepatitis A vaccination Case 2" then 'Should not vaccinate client with Hepatitis A dose as live vaccine was administered in the last 4 weeks. 
Check for any other vaccines due and inform the caregiver of when to come back for the first dose.'
    else ''
  end
IMMZEncounterElements
No live vaccine was administered in the last 4 weeks
IMMZD2DTHepatitisAEncounterElements
No live vaccine was administered in the last 4 weeks
IMMZD2DTHepatitisALiveAttenuatedHAV1DoseLogic
Client is due for Hepatitis A vaccination
IMMZD2DTHepatitisALiveAttenuatedHAV1DoseLogic
Client is due for Hepatitis A vaccination Guidance
IMMZD2DTHepatitisAEncounterElements
One hepatitis A primary series dose was administered
IMMZD2DTHepatitisALiveAttenuatedHAV1DoseLogic
Hepatitis A immunization schedule is complete
IMMZD2DTHepatitisALiveAttenuatedHAV1DoseLogic
Hepatitis A immunization schedule is complete Guidance
IMMZD2DTHepatitisALiveAttenuatedHAV1DoseLogic
Guidance

/*
@dynamicValue: Guidance
*/
define "Guidance":
  case 
    when "Client is not due for Hepatitis A vaccination" then "Client is not due for Hepatitis A vaccination Guidance"
    when "Client is due for Hepatitis A vaccination" then "Client is due for Hepatitis A vaccination Guidance"
    when "Hepatitis A immunization schedule is complete" then "Hepatitis A immunization schedule is complete Guidance" 
    else ''
  end
IMMZD2DTHepatitisALiveAttenuatedHAV1DoseLogic
Has Guidance

define "Has Guidance":
  "Guidance" is not null and "Guidance" != ''
IMMZCommon
seriesPrimary

/**
 * @description: Gets the doses from the primary series
 */
define fluent function seriesPrimary(immunizations List<Immunization>):
  immunizations I where
    exists( I.protocolApplied pa where pa.series = 'Primary series' )
FHIRHelpers
ToString
define function ToString(value string): value.value
FHIRHelpers
ToString
define function ToString(value ImmunizationStatus): value.value
FHIRHelpers
ToBoolean
define function ToBoolean(value boolean): value.value
FHIRHelpers
ToConcept

define function ToConcept(concept FHIR.CodeableConcept):
    if concept is null then
        null
    else
        System.Concept {
            codes: concept.coding C return ToCode(C),
            display: concept.text.value
        }
FHIRHelpers
ToCode

define function ToCode(coding FHIR.Coding):
    if coding is null then
        null
    else
        System.Code {
          code: coding.code.value,
          system: coding.system.value,
          version: coding.version.value,
          display: coding.display.value
        }
WHOCommon
mostRecent

define fluent function mostRecent(immunizations List<Immunization>):
  Last(
    immunizations I
      sort by start of occurrence.toInterval()
  )
